//: Lighthouse CI — perf / accessibility / best-practices / SEO on the key public pages. Run in CI by the `lighthouse` job (see .github/workflows/ci.yml). Boots `php artisan serve` against the seeded sqlite DB, audits each URL, then asserts category scores.

assert.//: Everything starts as `warn` (reports the score, never blocks a merge). Reason: these thresholds were set WITHOUT a verified baseline run, and a perf gate that fails on unverified numbers just trains people to ignore CI. After reviewing the first few real runs, promote the deterministic categories (seo, accessibility, best-practices) to `error`. Leave `performance` as warn unless numberOfRuns is raised — a single CI run is noisy (±10 pts).
